title: Senior Revenue Manager at Wyndham India

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at Wyndham India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, Wyndham India in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Wyndham India:
Wyndham India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Conduct regular guest satisfaction surveys and implement improvements
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in GDS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wyndham India!
